name: NV Heritage Tweed Overcoat
description: Artisanally tailored tweed overcoat crafted from an ultra-soft premium wool-blend. Features double-breasted buttoning, notched lapels, and a wind-resistant inner lining. Perfectly suited for winter styles and business meetings.

name: NV Executive Cashmere Sweater
description: Luxurious, incredibly soft 100% cashmere sweater designed with a classic crewneck. Boasts ribbed hem structures and elastic cuffs, maintaining a refined structure after years of use. Cozy yet lightweight.

name: NV Urban Leather Bomber Jacket
description: Sleek metropolitan style bomber jacket meticulously crafted from supple lambskin leather. Outfitted with heavy-duty silver YKK zippers, snap-button collar tabs, and deep internal pockets. Elevates any casual style.

name: NV Aurora Satin Evening Gown
description: Breathtaking premium floor-length gown tailored in shimmering liquid satin. Designed with a elegant cowl neckline, high thigh slit, and an adjustable corset-lace back. Destined to turn heads at formal galas and cocktail parties.

name: NV Monaco Linen Summer Dress
description: Breathable, lightweight 100% organic linen wrap dress featuring mid-length puff sleeves and a playful side-bow tie. Keeps you cool, crisp, and effortlessly elegant on sun-drenched afternoons and seaside resort stays.

name: NV Parisian Silk Wrap Blouse
description: Elegantly flowing wrap blouse woven from the finest mulberry silk. Accented with wide bell-sleeves, a plunge neckline, and dynamic waist ties. A versatile classic transitioning from office to candlelit dinners.

name: NV Playtime Organic Tee
description: Ultra-soft t-shirt woven from 100% organic combed cotton, ensuring a non-irritating feeling for delicate child skin. Enhanced with fun colorful dye styling and secure flatlock stitching.

name: NV Tiny Explorer Denim Overall
description: Adorable, heavy-duty toddler overalls in classic stone-washed denim fabric. Fitted with adjustable button buckle suspenders, detailed utility patch pockets, and secure metal side fasteners.

name: NV Blossom Meadow Dress
description: Beautiful multi-tiered floral lace dress detailed with a whimsical tulle skirt layer and dynamic shoulder bows. Inner lined with soft, sweat-wicking organic modal for comfortable wear.

name: NV Sculpt High-Rise Slim Jeans
description: High-density stretch-infused shapewear denim jeans that lift, mold, and hold curves beautifully. Designed with a sleek high-waisted rise and a tailored slim-fit ankle cut. Won't sag or bag out.

name: NV Distressed Vintage Denim
description: Vintage straight-leg denim jeans featuring curated distressed knee shredding and hand-brushed raw edge finishes. Gives an authentic retro thrift-store aesthetic with premium structured cotton comfort.

name: NV Metro Cargo Utility Jeans
description: Heavyweight premium cotton cargo jeans integrated with deep snap-button side utility pockets, knee stitching seams, and adjustable drawstring ankle cuffs. Excellent streetwear attire.

name: NV Crochet Meadow Crop Top
description: Exquisite hand-crocheted sleeveless crop top patterned with beautiful daisy floral elements. Woven in thick, high-quality organic cotton thread. Creates a gorgeous pairing with high-waisted linen pants.

name: NV Boho Chic Floral Blouse
description: Flowy floral georgette blouse detailed with metallic gold pinstripe threads, a split neck tassel tie-closure, and airy balloon sleeves. Captures a sophisticated bohemian wanderlust charm.

name: NV Minimalist Ribbed Tee
description: High-elastic fine-ribbed crewneck tee woven from silky modal-cotton fibers. Hugs coordinates seamlessly, acting as a clean foundation layer under blazers and jackets. Retains structural stretch perfectly.

name: NV Radiance Botanical Face Oil
description: Fast-absorbing, ultra-nourishing elixir formulated with organic rosehip seed, jojoba, and cold-pressed squalane. Deeply hydrates skin layers, fading dark spots and delivering a youthful velvet glow.

name: NV Velvet Rose Eau De Parfum
description: Captivating artisanal perfume combining velvety Damascus rose petal notes with warm cedarwood, black pepper accents, and creamy vanilla base tones. Leaves a sophisticated, long-lasting signature scent trail.

name: NV Rejuvenate Overnight Serum
description: Powerful clinical nighttime serum enriched with 2.5% encapsulated retinol, multi-peptides, and calming organic chamomile. Accelerates cell turnover overnight, smoothing wrinkles and restoring firmness.

name: NV Elite Italian Oxford Shoes
description: Crafted from hand-burnished, full-grain Italian calfskin leather. Showcases traditional close-lacing styling and durable double-stitched Goodyear welted leather soles. Epitome of formal corporate luxury.

name: NV Aero Pace Sport Sneakers
description: High-performance dynamic running shoes structured with impact-absorbing responsive nitrogen-infused foam mid-soles, breathable woven knit mesh, and maximum grip rubber outer tracks.

name: NV Sienna Chunky Suede Boots
description: Beautiful modern ladies boots structured in weather-treated soft premium split-suede leather. Features sturdy 2-inch block heels, cushioned insoles, and secure elastic side gussets.

name: NV Chronos Gold-Rimmed Watch
description: Exquisite wristwatch powered by Swiss quartz movement. Encased in scratch-proof sapphire crystal glass, detailed with an 18K gold-plated bezel, and secure alligator-embossed genuine leather bands.

name: NV Riviera Aviator Sunglasses
description: Chic, timeless aviator sunglasses fitted with protective 100% UVA/UVB polarized dark lenses, premium featherweight titanium wireframes, and soft adjustable silicone nose grips.

name: NV Sovereign Leather Belt
description: Reversible 2-in-1 leather belt crafted from full-grain saddle leather. Finished with a satin-brushed gunmetal rotatable buckle clasp. A versatile accessory matching formal and casual looks.
